items.title: SwitchBot、AIハブ向け「AIエージェントプラン」 月269円でLLM利用(Impress Watch)
items.summary: SWITCHBOTは29日、SwitchBotアプリ V9.26アップデートにおいて、「SwitchBot AIハブ」向けのサービス「AIエージェントプラン」を提供開始した。初月無料、翌月以降は月額2

items.title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
items.summary: You need infrastructure to build AI a and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

items.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
items.summary: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.

items.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
items.summary: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

items.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
items.summary: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

items.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
items.summary: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.

items.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
items.summary: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

items.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
items.summary: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

items.title: Oil jumps to highest price since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
items.summary: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

items.title: Comey surrenders over charge of threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
items.summary: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.

items.title: Bondi shooting inquiry calls for gun reform and more security at Jewish festivals
items.summary: An interim report says country should prioritise 'nationally consistent' firearms reforms.

items.title: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
items.summary: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.
